overview: The B.Sc. in Information Technology & Management (ITM) program is designed to meet the needs of modern business and industry. It focuses on practical aspects of IT, emphasizing how to design, develop and manage computer systems.
waiver_info: Result-based waiver (bachelor's), Waiver on SGPA (semester result), Female quota, Need-based, Quota for students, Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission quota, Freedom fighter quota
eligibility: 2.5 GPA and SSC/O-level and HSC/A-level with 7 subjects at A-level. For students who studied in English medium and passed all 7 subjects at A-level with 3 'A' grades and 4 'C' grades to be eligible for admission.
